page: Microsoft Azure M416s_6_v3 is a memory-optimized virtual machine belonging to the MSHighMemoryv3 family. Built on the x86_64 architecture and powered by Intel processors, this instance features 416 dedicated vCPUs and a massive memory capacity of 5696.0 GB. This configuration yields approximately 13.69 GB of RAM per core, positioning the server at the upper tier of memory density.

The instance does not include local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met via external block storage. It is Premium Storage capable, allowing integration with high-performance persistent disks. The virtualization layer is managed by the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, ensuring dedicated CPU allocation and resource isolation. No complimentary public IPv4 addresses are bundled with this server.

Given the massive resource footprint, this server represents a high-density hardware class designed for enterprise-scale workloads. The qualitative cost profile reflects its specialized nature, trading off local storage and GPU acceleration for extreme memory capacity and high vCPU counts. This makes the instance highly suitable for large-scale in-memory databases, such as SAP HANA, massive relational database management systems, and heavy enterprise resource planning workloads.
description: Microsoft Azure M416s_6_v3 is a memory-optimized virtual machine from the MSHighMemoryv3 family, designed for large-scale enterprise workloads. Running on the x86_64 architecture with Intel processors, it features 416 dedicated vCPUs and 5696.0 GB of system memory, providing approximately 13.69 GB of RAM per core. The instance operates on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor and does not include local storage, though it is Premium Storage capable for external block storage integration. With zero bundled GPUs and no complimentary public IPv4 addresses, this server is engineered specifically for memory-intensive applications. It is highly suited for massive in-memory databases, enterprise resource planning systems, and large-scale data processing tasks that require substantial memory capacity and high compute density without the need for local disk storage or graphics acceleration.
og_description: Microsoft Azure M416s_6_v3 is a memory-optimized virtual machine featuring 416 dedicated Intel vCPUs and 5696.0 GB of RAM, designed for enterprise-scale in-memory databases and ERP workloads.
